note: Atrium deployed to Robinhood Chain testnet (Arbitrum L2). Stylus (Rust) contracts compile + activate natively here, confirming Robinhood Chain has Stylus enabled. The three #[constructor] Stylus contracts (Coffer, Vigil, Plinth) require the canonical StylusDeployer contract, which is not yet present on this chain (eth_getCode(0xcEcba2F1...) == 0x); they are a documented follow-on. The Solidity stack + the initialize()-based Stylus contracts are live.

mock-aave-pool.note: Testnet pool stub (no real Aave on Robinhood Chain testnet).

mock-chainlink-usd-feed.note: USDC/USD price stub ($1.00, 8dp, always-fresh) for the Plinth dual-oracle Chainlink leg.

plinth-oracle.note: Dual-oracle (Chainlink + Pyth) median price reader, Rust/Stylus. Live + activated.

plinth-math.note: SPAN margin compute, Rust/Stylus. Live + activated.

sigil.note: EIP-712 agent-mandate contract, Rust/Stylus. Live + activated + initialized (praetor_multisig = deployer).

pending.note: Coffer, Vigil, Plinth use #[constructor] and need the canonical StylusDeployer on Robinhood Chain; AtriumRouter + adapters wire on top of those. Follow-on: deploy the StylusDeployer (or upgrade cargo-stylus to a version that auto-deploys it), then deploy the trio + Router + AaveHorizonAdapter, mirroring the Arbitrum Sepolia stack.
